channel.title: LockTodo
channel.description: LockTodo keeps your most important task visible the moment you wake your iPhone screen, with a calm iOS-native experience built for everyday focus.

item.title: Welcome to LockTodo
item.description: Why we are building a calmer kind of iPhone productivity experience.

item.title: How to Put a Todo on Your iPhone Lock Screen
item.description: A practical walkthrough for surfacing the next task on your iPhone without creating a noisy setup.

item.title: An Apple Reminders Workflow for Minimal Daily Planning
item.description: A simple way to use Apple Reminders for planning the day without turning it into a project management system.

item.title: Three Shortcuts for a Calmer iPhone Task Flow
item.description: Simple automation ideas that help Apple Reminders and your lock screen feel more intentional.

item.title: The Best iPhone Productivity Setup for People Who Hate Busy Apps
item.description: A quieter mobile setup built around focus, fewer surfaces, and stronger visual hierarchy.
